results.title: Watch: India stun China to win 4x100m gold with season-best time at Asian C'ships
results.description: India's women's 4x100m relay team blazed to gold at the Asian Relay Championships 2026, clocking a season-best 43.85 seconds. Tamanna and Sneha Shanuvalli also contributed to a mixed 4x100m bronze. While sprint relays shone, the 4x400m teams faced challenges. Overall, India secured one gold, one silver, and one bronze, showcasing a mixed but promising performance ahead of major events.

results.title: Stock Market Today: Sensex, Nifty Trade Higher in Early Deals Amid Easing West Asia Tensions
results.description: Sensex surged over 400 points or 0.54 per cent to touch an intraday high of 77,223 in morning trade, while Nifty traded more than 100 points or 0.51 per cent higher at 24,137. Among sectoral indices, IT stocks led the gains, with the Nifty IT index rising over 1 per cent.
